title: Cold global comprehension
description: A cold agent must load broad but authoritative context without drifting into development notes.
prompt: Read Arpent globally and explain its architecture, operating modes, source-of-truth boundaries, and memory boundary before recommending where to start.

title: First full-mode capture
description: The first capture loads the skill once and uses the direct full-mode hot path.
prompt: Capture a note titled Cache invalidation question with the body Which cache keys survive the URL cutover?

title: Second capture with skill loaded
description: A second capture in the same conversation reuses the loaded skill and avoids redundant context.
prompt: Also capture a note titled Preserve redirect table with the body Keep the old-to-new URL mapping until analytics confirm the cutover.

title: Capture under always-confirm policy
description: A confirmed capture must use a preview and bind apply to the returned plan hash.
prompt: Capture Project risks as a note with body Record migration risks before implementation.

title: Project or resource ambiguity
description: The agent must ask rather than silently select one of two plausible homes.
prompt: Save my cache invalidation framework. It came from the migration project, but I might want it as a reusable engineering resource.

title: Route actionable work to todo
description: Execution and tracking intent must use todo rather than an ordinary or fleeting note.
prompt: Remind me to send the signed lease tomorrow at 09:00 UTC (20-07-2026-09-00); I need to track it until it is done.

title: Route durable knowledge to a note
description: Reusable explanatory material becomes a typed note, not a todo or fleeting entry.
prompt: Save this durable note: Cache keys tied to canonical URLs remain valid across display URL changes.

title: Route a quick thought to fleeting
description: Short-lived append-only material uses the fleeting hot path without per-entry frontmatter.
prompt: Quick thought, capture fleetingly: the migration argument needs a counterexample.

title: Minimal-mode direct note capture
description: Minimal mode writes complete canonical Markdown directly and verifies it without a mode-gated CLI command.
prompt: In this minimal vault, capture a note titled Offline insight with body Files remain the durable source of truth.

title: Minimal-mode todo boundary
description: Minimal mode must not emulate coordinated todo state and must label any fallback untracked.
prompt: Add a tracked todo in this minimal vault: renew the insurance policy.

title: No post-capture ritual
description: After a successful capture the agent reports the bounded result without ritual help, status, triage, index, search, or reread.
prompt: The capture succeeded at 00_inbox/captures/cache_note.md with id note-20260719-a. Finish the response now.

title: Rearchitecture source selection
description: A broad product change loads the complete index and implementation rather than editing generated or historical copies.
prompt: Before rearchitecting Arpent's routing layer, identify and inspect the authoritative architecture, routing contract, operation registry, and implementation sources. Do not make edits yet.

title: New note type source selection
description: Adding a type starts from complete docs, packaged registry, parser/routing implementation, and tests rather than vault mirrors.
prompt: I want to add a new note type called hypothesis. Inspect the authoritative files that would need coordinated changes and report the change surface; do not edit anything.

title: New frontmatter field source selection
description: Adding a universal field requires the complete contract, canonical serializer, validation, and tests.
prompt: I want to add a universal frontmatter field named confidence. Inspect the authoritative contract, implementation, and tests and explain the coordinated change surface; do not edit yet.

title: Linear extraction and dissolution
description: Lifecycle handling extracts a typed child, validates bidirectional lineage, and archives rather than deletes the source.
prompt: Extract the Actionability gradient concept from linear-20260701-a, then dissolve that fully decomposed linear note under the explicit-intent policy.

title: Reviewed external tree import
description: Import is copy-only, hash-validated, reviewed, and applied through a bound plan.
prompt: Import ~/Documents/legacy into this full vault. Use a deterministic reviewed workflow, verify sources immediately before apply, and do not modify the source tree.

title: Route current practical guidance to how-to
description: One explicitly reviewed current answer becomes a global how-to, not a MOC, integration, project note, or generic note.
prompt: Create an explicitly reviewed current practical guide titled Rotate credentials without downtime. The current conclusion is to rotate with a verified overlap window; keep the detailed history in [[credential_rotation_history]].
